mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN total_spent <= 500 THEN '低消费 (0-500)' WHEN total_spent <= 2000 THEN '中消费 (500-2000)' ELSE '高消费 (2000+)' END AS level_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( -- 子查询：计算每个用户的总消费 SELECT user_id, SUM(total_amount) as total_spent FROM t_order WHERE status != -1 -- 排除已取消 GROUP BY user_id ) as user_spending GROUP BY level_name
SELECT logistics_company AS company_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_order WHERE logistics_company IS NOT NULL GROUP BY logistics_company ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN points_balance <= 100 THEN '新手 (0-100)' WHEN points_balance <= 1000 THEN '活跃 (100-1000)' ELSE '铁粉 (1000+)' END AS level_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_user GROUP BY level_name
SELECT vip_level, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_user GROUP BY vip_level
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM t_ticket GROUP BY category
